holo_flow

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Imports
  • Exports
Source   Edit  

reader/writer types that use a "dynamic buffer" that can load/flush data immediately or when it becomes available via a callback (which can read from streams etc)

the buffer also shrinks to remove data up to a position marked as read when it needs to resize, although a queue would be better for this, but strings keep compatibility

Imports

holo_reader, holo_writer

Exports

peekCount, peekMatch, holoReaderPeekStrCopyMem, startRead, unsafePeek, peekOrZero, hasNext, nextMatch, peekMatch, peekMatch, nextMatch, peek, peek, lockBuffer, startRead, unsafePeek, peek, nextMatch, peekMatch, peekMatch, unlockBuffer, nextMatch, unsafeNext, unsafeNextBy, HoloReader, hasNext, next, initHoloReader, next, startRead, loadBufferBy, peek, peek, peekMatch, nextMatch, loadBufferOne, peekMatch, next, peekMatch, BufferLoader, peekMatch, nextMatch, peekMatch, peekNext, nextMatch, holoReaderLineColumn, initHoloWriter, startWrite, lockFlush, consumeBufferFull, BufferConsumer, write, addToBuffer, HoloWriter, startWrite, startWrite, addToBuffer, finishWrite, unlockFlush, addToBuffer, write, addToBuffer, write, write, consumeBuffer
